name: Carrots and Grapes Vermouth
recipeIngredient: 2 (10 oz.) packages Green Giant Crinkle Cut Frozen in Butter Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook carrots according to package directions.
2. Open the carrot pouch and drain the butter sauce into a medium saucepan.
3. Stir in brown sugar and vermouth.
4. In a small bowl, mix cornstarch and water until smooth.
5. Blend the cornstarch mixture into the butter sauce.
6. Heat over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is smooth and slightly thickened.
7. Add carrots and grapes to the sauce.
8. Continue heating for an additional 2 minutes.
This elegant side dish pairs well in good taste and can be prepared ahead of time. Simply prepare the carrots as directed, adding the grapes just before serving. Ensure the dish is heated thoroughly.
